message:
🐛 Add pointer cursor to navbar clickable elements (#10650) (#10674)

Add cursor-pointer to all navbar buttons and links missing it:
hamburger, docs link, AI missions, theme toggle, overflow menu trigger,
and overflow AI missions button.

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
